G

generateCountryMap() - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a 2D array representing the map of the country.
generateData() - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a complete set of transport data including the country map, list of stations, and list of departures.
generateDeparture(String, String, int, int) - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a random departure for the specified transport type and origin city.
generateDepartures(List<Station>) - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a list of departures (bus and train trips) for each station.
generateStations() - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Generates transport stations (both bus and train) for each city on the map.
getAllNodes() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.Graph
Returns a collection of all nodes in the graph.
getArrivalTime() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Calculates and returns the arrival time by adding the duration to the departure time.
getBusStation() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Gets the bus station name.
getCities() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Returns a list of City objects, created based on the country map and available stations.
getCity() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphNode
Returns the city associated with this node.
getCity() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Gets the city name.
getCost() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphEdge
Returns the cost of traveling along this edge.
getCost() - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.Path
Returns the total cost of the path.
getCountryMap() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Returns the country map as a 2D array of city names.
getDepartures() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Gets the list of departures from this station.
getDepartures() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Returns the list of departures.
getDepartures() - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.Path
Returns the list of departures used in the path.
getDeparturesFromCity() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphNode
Returns the list of departures available from this node's station.
getDepartureTime() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the departure time as a string.
getDimensions() - Method in class com.transportapp.gui.DimensionInputDialog
Gets the dimensions entered by the user.
getDuration() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the duration of the trip in minutes.
getEdges() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphNode
Returns a list of edges (routes) connected to this node.
getFrom() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the departure station.
getId() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphNode
Returns the unique identifier of this node.
getMinTransferTime() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the minimum transfer time after arrival.
getName() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Returns the name of the city.
getNeighbors(int, int) - Method in class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Returns a list of neighboring cities (up, down, left, right) for the given city coordinates.
getNode(String) - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.Graph
Retrieves a node from the graph by its ID.
getNodes() - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.Path
Returns the list of graph nodes in the path.
getParsedDepartureTime() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Parses and returns the departure time as a LocalTime object.
getPrice() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the price of the trip.
getStation() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Returns the station located in the city.
getStations() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Returns the list of stations.
getTarget() - Method in class com.transportapp.graph.GraphEdge
Returns the target node that this edge points to.
getTo() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the destination city.
getTotalTravelTimeInMinutes() - Method in class com.transportapp.routing.Path
Returns the total travel time including waiting times.
getTrainStation() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station
Gets the train station name.
getType() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Returns the type of transport.
getX() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Returns the x-coordinate of the city.
getY() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.City
Returns the y-coordinate of the city.
Graph - Class in com.transportapp.graph
Represents a graph structure used for modeling transport routes between cities or stations.
Graph() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.graph.Graph
 
GraphEdge - Class in com.transportapp.graph
Represents a directed edge in the transport graph.
GraphEdge(GraphNode, int) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.graph.GraphEdge
Constructs a GraphEdge that points to the given target node with the specified cost.
GraphNode - Class in com.transportapp.graph
Represents a node in the transport graph.
GraphNode(String, City) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.graph.GraphNode
Constructs a GraphNode with the given ID and associated city.
GraphVisualizer - Class in com.transportapp.gui
The class is responsible for rendering a visual representation of a transport graph, including cities as nodes and departures as edges, using JavaFX's GraphicsContext.
GraphVisualizer(TransportData, GraphicsContext) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.gui.GraphVisualizer
Constructs a GraphVisualizer with the given transport data and graphics context.
